module_info.docstring:
Tests for time travel functionality in MCP Agent Mail.

Tests historical inbox snapshot retrieval including:
- Basic time travel page rendering
- Historical inbox snapshots
- Timestamp parsing edge cases
- Commit traversal and message retrieval
- Error handling for invalid inputs

functions.name: _get_git_head_sha
functions.docstring: Get the HEAD SHA from a git repository (synchronous helper).

functions.name: _setup_time_travel_data
functions.docstring: Create test project with messages at different times.

functions.name: test_time_travel_page_renders
functions.docstring: Test GET /mail/archive/time-travel returns the time travel page.

functions.name: test_time_travel_page_lists_projects
functions.docstring: Test time travel page includes available projects.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_valid_timestamp
functions.docstring: Test snapshot retrieval with valid timestamp.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_past_timestamp
functions.docstring: Test snapshot retrieval with timestamp before any commits.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_utc_timestamp
functions.docstring: Test snapshot with UTC timestamp (Z suffix).

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_timezone_offset
functions.docstring: Test snapshot with timezone offset timestamp.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_naive_timestamp
functions.docstring: Test snapshot with naive timestamp (no timezone).

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_invalid_timestamp_format
functions.docstring: Test snapshot with completely invalid timestamp format.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_missing_timestamp
functions.docstring: Test snapshot with missing timestamp parameter.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_invalid_project
functions.docstring: Test snapshot with invalid project slug.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_invalid_agent_name
functions.docstring: Test snapshot with invalid agent name format.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_nonexistent_agent
functions.docstring: Test snapshot for agent that doesn't exist.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_nonexistent_project
functions.docstring: Test snapshot for project that doesn't exist.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_partial_date_format
functions.docstring: Test snapshot with partial date format (date only, no time).

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_leap_second
functions.docstring: Test snapshot with leap second timestamp.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_negative_timezone
functions.docstring: Test snapshot with negative timezone offset.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_epoch
functions.docstring: Test snapshot at Unix epoch.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_response_structure
functions.docstring: Test that snapshot response has expected structure.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_message_fields
functions.docstring: Test that messages in snapshot have expected fields.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_xss_in_project
functions.docstring: Test XSS prevention in project parameter.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_xss_in_agent
functions.docstring: Test XSS prevention in agent parameter.

functions.name: test_time_travel_page_no_projects
functions.docstring: Test time travel page when no projects exist.

functions.name: test_time_travel_snapshot_project_no_messages
functions.docstring: Test snapshot for project with no messages.
